meaning: 阿勒山[土耳其东部](一译"亚拉腊",据基督教<<圣经>>载,大洪水后诺亚方舟即停于此)
examples: View from the plane – holy Mount Ararat, located in Turkey.
An ancient cemetery and a white top of Ararat on the right.
Previous expeditions have also come back from Mount Ararat with evidence of Noah's ark.
If the border were open, Armenians could then climb their sacred Mount Ararat.
Pacific Hydro already runs Australia's largest wind farm, a 35-turbine, 52-megawatt development that is spread over a number of grazing properties at Ararat in western Victoria.
